title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map got fresher
gist.blurb: The API field guide has been regenerated from the production OpenAPI spec. Fewer mysteries in the garden, more accurate routes through it.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification after a successful deploy, adding two updated lines of API reference material.
gist.impact: Developers reading the API docs get reference material aligned with the currently deployed API.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly as a tiny librarian with round glasses updating a glowing API field guide beside a retro terminal, with fresh code-leaves and small flowers growing around the book to represent documentation synchronized with the live platform.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown stripes, black oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blush, small smile, light blue translucent wings, and tiny librarian glasses, carefully stamping an updated glowing API field guide beside a retro terminal. Code-plants and small flowers sprout around the book, with prominent lime green (#ecf874), warm cream and lavender pastels, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; pixel-font text: 'API DOCS'.
